training_status: maintains base weight, performs LISS and weight lifting

benefits.description: All day energy boost; able to work all day, go to gym, and hit 90+ minute sessions

protocol_notes: On second cycle of SLU-PP, not 100% convinced of results. MOTS-c user reports sustained energy throughout day and evening workouts. Planning to start AAS protocol in April for push phase. Maintenance phase currently until spring/summer.
